name: InlineQueryResultCachedGif
description: Represents a link to an animated GIF file stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this animated GIF file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with specified content instead of the animation.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the result, must be gif

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this result, 1-64 bytes

fields.name: gif_file_id
fields.description: A valid file identifier for the GIF file

fields.name: caption
fields.description: Caption of the GIF file to be sent, 0-1024 characters after entities parsing

fields.name: parse_mode
fields.description: Mode for parsing entities in the caption. See formatting options for more details.

fields.name: caption_entities
fields.description: List of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of parse_mode

fields.name: show_caption_above_media
fields.description: Pass True, if the caption must be shown above the message media

fields.name: reply_markup
fields.description: Inline keyboard attached to the message

fields.name: input_message_content
fields.description: Content of the message to be sent instead of the GIF animation
